messages.content:
Deep read:

Reply 1 — Emotional Reflection
I hear the pressure behind your words.
Primary signal: general support.
Underlying drivers: general_support.
This is valid, and it also needs a strategic response.

Reply 2 — Practical Strategy
Let's convert this into actions you can execute immediately.
1) Choose one hard thing and one kind thing to do today.

Reply 3 — Philosophical Clarity
Three perspective anchors:
"A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step." — Lao Tzu
"Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom." — Aristotle
"What we think, we become." — Buddha
Small truthful actions beat dramatic promises every time.
